reasoning: Incurred loss triangle — expect medium-length tail, shorter than Paid Loss but longer than Reported Count. Selected starting age 203 (16.75 years): is_monotone_from_here=False but cv=0.011 (low), slope_sign_changes=5. Although observed factors show late-age volatility (not monotone), double exponential curve method effectively captures non-monotone decay patterns through log-quadratic fitting. Gap_flag=False with gap_to_last_observed=0.00003 confirms excellent smooth transition from observed factors to fitted curve — curve rejoins observed LDFs at switchover age. WLS fit on log(factor−1) from age 203 onward using 7 selected LDF intervals. Double exponential selected over simpler methods (bondy, modified bondy) because excellent R²=0.886 and stable LOO std dev=0.0037 justify more sophisticated curve form. Age 203 preferred over earlier age 143 due to structural stability: slope_sign_changes=5 vs 9 at age 143. Closure anchor applies: at 203 months (16.75 years), casualty line expected >95% closed, losses substantively complete. Tail 0.79% of CDF is material but defensible — materiality anchor does not apply (>0.1% threshold). Paid loss tail materially longer than incurred (1.045 vs 1.0216) as expected for casualty line.
prior_delta_driver: Baseline selection; no prior year comparison available in context.
alternatives_considered: Age 143 all methods rejected: is_monotone_from_here=False, slope_sign_changes=9 indicates structural instability. Age 143 double_exp (R²=0.33) rejected due to poor fit quality (<0.75 threshold). Bondy (age 143 and 203): tail 0.44% immaterial, but Bondy provides no diagnostics; rejected in favor of double_exp with R²=0.886. Modified Bondy Double Dev (1.0238) and Square Ratio (1.0239): no diagnostics, tails 0.87–0.88% materially higher than double_exp; rejected due to inferior diagnostic support. McClenahan (tail ~1.0000): inappropriate for incurred loss dollar measure, tail essentially zero. Age 203 double_exp selected as only rigorous method meeting R² >0.85 and gap_flag=False criteria.
diagnostics_summary: R²=0.886 (excellent fit, >0.85 threshold). LOO std dev=0.0037 (stable, acceptable <0.005). Gap to last observed=0.00003 (essentially zero, gap_flag=False confirms smooth curve transition). Residuals show balanced distribution (5 non-zero residuals across 7 factors, max |residual|~0.45). Tail 0.79% of CDF (material to reserve accuracy). Sensitivity: +10% tail → +$1,064,368 reserve delta (1.3% of base); −10% → −$1,300,894 (−1.6%); +20% → +$1,951,341 (2.4%); −20% → −$2,927,011 (−3.6%). Closure anchor verified: 203-month age corresponds to ~16.75 years development; casualty incurred losses substantively complete at this maturity. No environmental changes identified; development pattern stable across 2001-2024 study period. Cross-check: incurred tail (1.0216) < paid loss tail (expected 1.04+) as required for casualty line.
